fields.summary: Unable to send a informed consent

content.text: Hi! i have been trying to send this pt a informed consent using the send consent button on sf and it does not send ever. Is there a bug in this pts file?

requestType.name: General Help Desk Request
requestType.description: Submit a Request or report and issue; fields below are based upon your selection.

content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33418 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
The issue HEAL-33418 has been assigned to me. I’m taking a look now and will keep you updated as I make progress.
Let me know if there’s any additional context that might help.
Is this similar to a previous issue,
Can you please explain the steps you are taking and which part is not working? Any errors or alerts?
The issue appears to be in flow Autolaunch_Send_Patient_Agreements_to_Patient.
The flow checks for existing Informed Consent Patient Agreement records.
Its matching logic is too broad.
It counts expired/incomplete Informed Consent records as valid matches.
Because of that, the flow does not create/send a new Informed Consent and attempts to update the existing Patient Agreement record.
In this case, the flow attempted to update the Patient Agreement ‘a5VRh000004BUAPMA4’ on the Account '0010b00002dC2y2AAC'
Update the flow logic so expired or incomplete Informed Consent records are not treated as valid existing consent matches.
Navigate to a Person Account that has a Patient Agreements named 'Informed Consent [YEAR]'
Click on the button ‘Send Patient Agreements’
Select ‘Informed Consent’ and Click 'Send Selected Agreements'
You will see the message “Patient Agreements Have Been Assigned”
Go to Person Account > Patient Agreements and you will see that the 'Informed Consent' Patient Agreement was not created and not sent.
